assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Zoho Self Client and obtain the first OAuth access token using client credentials.

first_success.outcome: Zoho validates the Self Client credentials and returns an OAuth access token.
first_success.observable_signal: The token endpoint returns JSON containing access_token, api_domain, token_type, and expires_in values.

route_selection.surface: Self Client client-credentials access token via cURL
route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.
route_selection.selected: Self Client client-credentials access token via cURL

candidates.name: Self Client client-credentials access token via cURL
candidates.reason: The Self Client flow produces a server-to-server access token with a direct cURL request and no SDK.

candidates.name: Authorization code flow
candidates.reason: It adds browser consent and redirect handling; Self Client client credentials is the documented server-to-server route requested here.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Zoho and open the API Console.
Register a Self Client and choose the client-credentials flow.
Copy the client ID and client secret and identify the required scope and organization ID.
required_path.observable_result: All token request values are available.

required_path.action: Use cURL to POST the documented client_credentials token request to the correct Zoho accounts domain.
Confirm the response includes an access token and expiry metadata.
required_path.observable_result: A usable OAuth access token is present.

prerequisites.description: A Zoho account with access to the API Console and target organization.
A Self Client client ID and client secret.
Valid scopes and organization identifier for the target Zoho service.

external_gates.description: The requested scopes and organization ID must be valid for the target Zoho service.
The token request requires the Self Client ID and secret.

platform_outcomes.description: Zoho validates the Self Client credentials and returns an OAuth access token.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

sources.title: Client Credentials Flow for Self Client

uncertainties.question: The required organization parameter and available scopes vary among Zoho products and data centers.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
